infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FabricLens AI needs access to your camera to scan fabrics.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FabricLens AI needs access to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: FabricLens AI needs to save photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FabricLens AI to access your camera to scan fabrics.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow FabricLens AI to access your microphone.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FabricLens AI to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FabricLens AI to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FabricLens AI to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow FabricLens AI to save photos.
